infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PilotPay Tracker uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PilotPay Tracker uses the microphone to record audio clips that stay with your in-app creations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PilotPay Tracker accesses your photo library to let you choose media that appears in the app.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: PilotPay Tracker uses your calendar to place app events onto your device schedule.
